title: Eggo Gamble
body:
# 🥚Eggo Gamble🎰
Another mod from the "Eggo" series!
This mod adds functional **gambling!** _(with in-game items only, of course)_. Currently contains only two machines, with more features already being in development.

## 🎰Egslot Machine
There are two versions of the **Egslot Machine**.

- **Egslot Machine Personal** - Simple. Craft it, place it, and bet an item! This machine requires you to have atleast 2 items in hand. 
Right click with two bet items in hand to start spinning!

  **Recipe below:**

 ![personalmachinerecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87e5073473ca78ad967ed3b52863ca70ba7af0a4.png)
 
 
 
 
- **Egslot Machine** - A multiplayer supported version. The owner (person who placed down the machine) cannot play. Instead, when right clicked, the owner can configure the bet item, bet amount, and fill up the storage or take out the earns. Others can play on it!
_Other players can crouch-click the machine to check the bet item and bet amount!_

  **Recipe below:**

![multiplayeregslotmachinerecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9723357f96aeb93d43419530e3be798ef896e4.png)


## 🎰Dice Table ⬅️COMING SOON❓
There are two versions of the **Dice Table**.

- **Dice Table Personal** - Simple. Craft it, place it, and bet an item! This table tries to replicate the game **"Craps"**
Right click with a bet item in hand to start rolling!

  **Recipe below:**

![personaldicerecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0a8cde6106235fa43bd5a66b024b9f6db8679ed.png)




- **Dice Table** - A multiplayer supported version. The owner (person who placed down the machine) cannot play. Instead, when right clicked, the owner can configure the bet item, and fill up the storage or take out the earns. Others can play on it!

  **Recipe below:**

![dicetablerecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69a86ce403363d1414b6e5e9a484161467e6b31f.png)


_[Bet items and the jackpot multiplier can be configured in the server config]*_
_[Default settings allow: Diamond, Gold, Iron, Emerald and have an 8x multiplier]_

_*The config is located in world > serverconfig and works per world only on Forge. On Neoforge, the config is located in instance folder > config and is global_

## 🥚More features coming soon!❓
